title: Electric vehicle (EV) pavement channels grant: local authority allocations
body: "The electric vehicle (EV) pavement channels grant funds local authorities to install cross-pavement channels in England. This will support residents without access to off-street parking to charge their EVs at home and benefit from cheaper, domestic tariffs.  This page explains how the £25 million capital fund will be allocated to local authorities  over the financial year of 2025 to 2026. Capital funding is available to all Tier 1 local authorities (unitary, county or combined authorities) in England.  Read about how local authorities can apply for EV pavement channels grant funding.  "
